import sqlite3 from contextlib import contextmanager DATABASE = 'urls.db' def init_db(): with get_db() as conn: conn.execute(''' CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS urls ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, original_url TEXT NOT NULL, short_code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ''') conn.commit() @contextmanager def get_db(): conn = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE) conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row try: yield conn finally: conn.close() import string import random from database import get_db class URLModel: @staticmethod def generate_short_code(length=6): characters = string.ascii_letters + string.digits return ''.join(random.choice(characters) for _ in range(length)) @classmethod def create_url(cls, original_url): short_code = cls.generate_short_code() with get_db() as conn: cursor = conn.execute( 'INSERT INTO urls (original_url, short_code) VALUES (?, ?)', (original_url, short_code) ) conn.commit() return short_code @staticmethod def get_original_url(short_code): with get_db() as conn: row = conn.execute( 'SELECT original_url FROM urls WHERE short_code = ?', (short_code,) ).fetchone() if row: return row['original_url'] return None URL Shortener
